enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'O Sone Sone'?

The song conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating uniqueness and enthusiasm.

How does 'O Sone Sone' fit into the plot of Singam 3?

This song is featured in a vibrant context, enhancing the film's energetic moments and showcasing the protagonist's spirit.

Who are the singers of 'O Sone Sone'?

The song is sung by Javed Ali and Priya Subaramani.

Who composed the music for 'O Sone Sone'?

The music is composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and energetic tunes.

When was 'O Sone Sone' released?

The song was released on November 27, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In O Sone Sone, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the lively spirit of the characters in Singam 3. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The collaboration between Javed Ali and Priya Subaramani adds a unique charm, while Harrish Jeyaraj's composition ensures that the song remains memorable. Overall, it captures the essence of fun and excitement, resonating with audiences looking for an energetic boost.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: O Sone Sone from Singam 3 is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. With the dynamic vocals of Javed Ali and Priya Subaramani, this song is a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits. The collaboration with Harrish Jeyaraj's vibrant music makes it an unforgettable anthem for any party.
stanzaMeanings: Oh beautiful one, super beautiful, come to me, I am the energy tonic.
Yes, oh beautiful one, super beautiful. I will show you, I am very unique.
Just look at me, I will come with a lot of energy.
My heart is set on winning, it burns with passion.
With a little tension, I will become a terror.
I am a good watchman, my face is like a lion.
Oh beautiful one, super beautiful, come to me, I am the energy tonic.
Yes, oh beautiful one, super beautiful. I will show you, I am very unique.
In my night and day, everything is connected. My neurons are searching for you.
Are you coming to sing? I will dance like a fire.
This is a joyful celebration, ho ho..
Yes, beautiful one, new sounds, beautiful sounds..
Oh beautiful one, super beautiful, come to me, I am the energy tonic.

My one eye scans only you.
Even if you run away, my GPS will shine.

In my heart, there is a change, hey eyyy..
Yes, beautiful one, yes, beautiful one.
